prompts.title: Blog Post Copywriter
prompts.description: Generate high-quality blog posts from a topic, tuned to a specific audience and SEO keyword.
prompts.role: Senior content marketer and SEO strategist
prompts.task: Draft a complete blog post based on the provided topic and constraints.
prompts.context: You are helping me write a blog post for {{ AUDIENCE }} on the topic of {{ TOPIC }}. The post should be optimized to rank for the primary SEO keyword {{ SEO_KEYWORD }}.
prompts.constraints: Target approximately {{ WORD_COUNT }} words. The tone should be informative, engaging, and trustworthy. Avoid clickbait. Use clear headings and short paragraphs.
prompts.outputFormat: Return a fully written blog post with: a compelling title, optional subtitle, introduction, 3–7 well-structured sections with H2/H3 headings, and a concise conclusion.

prompts.title: Email Copywriter
prompts.description: Draft a clear, targeted email that achieves a specific goal for a defined recipient.
prompts.role: Senior lifecycle and email marketing copywriter
prompts.task: Write a single, well-structured email based on my inputs.
prompts.context: I need to send an email for the following purpose: {{ PURPOSE }}. The recipient can be described as: {{ RECIPIENT_DESCRIPTION }}. The overall goal of this email is: {{ GOAL }}. The key message I need to communicate is: {{ KEY_MESSAGE }}.
prompts.constraints: Keep the email under {{ MAX_WORD_COUNT }} words. The tone should be {{ TONE }}. Avoid jargon, and make sure the call to action is explicit.
prompts.outputFormat: Return the final email in plain text with: subject line, greeting, body paragraphs, closing, and a clear call to action.

prompts.title: Code Review Assistant
prompts.description: Review code for correctness, design, readability, and potential issues.
prompts.role: Senior {{ LANGUAGE }} engineer and code reviewer
prompts.task: Review the provided code snippet or patch and highlight issues and improvements.
prompts.context: You are reviewing the following {{ LANGUAGE }} code: {{ CODE }}.
prompts.constraints: Focus on correctness, clarity, performance, and maintainability. Do not rewrite everything from scratch unless necessary. Assume a reasonably experienced engineer as the reader.
prompts.outputFormat: Respond with: (1) a short summary of overall impressions, (2) a bullet list of concrete issues or suggestions grouped by category (bugs, readability, design, performance), and (3) optional improved code snippets where helpful.

prompts.title: Concept Explainer (Feynman Technique)
prompts.description: Explain a concept simply using the Feynman technique, taking into account my background.
prompts.role: Patient teacher who explains complex ideas in simple language
prompts.task: Help me build a deep understanding of the target concept using iterative explanations.
prompts.context: The concept I want to understand is: {{ CONCEPT }}. Here is my current understanding: {{ MY_CURRENT_UNDERSTANDING }}. My background is: {{ MY_BACKGROUND }}.
prompts.constraints: Use plain language, concrete examples, and analogies that fit my background. Avoid unnecessary jargon and define any technical terms you must use.
prompts.outputFormat: First, give a simple explanation as if teaching a beginner. Then ask 2–3 quick questions to probe my understanding. Finally, suggest how I could explain the concept back to you in my own words.

prompts.title: Decision Matrix Builder
prompts.description: Turn options and context into a decision matrix that clarifies tradeoffs.
prompts.task: Build a decision matrix that compares options against clear criteria.
prompts.context: I am choosing between {{ OPTION 1 }} and {{ OPTION_2 }}. Context: {{ CONTEXT }}. I need to make this decision by {{ TIMELINE }}. Key stakeholders: {{ KEY_STAKEHOLDERS }}.
prompts.constraints: Focus on the most important 3–7 criteria. Be neutral and explicit about tradeoffs. Avoid recommending an option until after you have shown the matrix.
prompts.outputFormat: Return a markdown table with rows as criteria and columns for each option plus a notes column. After the table, add a short narrative that (1) summarizes tradeoffs, and (2) makes a clear recommendation with reasoning.
